title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c deaddrop_get SenML uses 'count' - confirm against spec/appendix-senml.md and 18-apps
description: New handler uses senml_add_float with name "count" but spec may expect specific record names for DTN status (e.g. buffered, pending_iids). Also discovered missing DTN provider callback registration pattern. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-9wd9
